dialogueItems.dialogue: Hiya Pip! Welcome to the adventure! Quick tip — press I on your keyboard or Down on the D-pad to see your controls anytime. Now watch your step, these platforms are bouncier than they look!

Oh hello there, little roller! See those shiny gold coins sparkling everywhere? Collect them all — every single one! Roll over the flowers too, they make the most delightful little ding sound. Go on, try it!

STOP RIGHT THERE, Pip! The bridge ahead has some nasty holes in it — one wrong roll and you'll plunge straight into the depths below! Take it slow, jump carefully over each gap, and you'll make it through just fine. You've got this!

Yippee! You actually did it! You found the key, made it past every obstacle, and rolled all the way here! You really are the greatest roller in the whole wide world! Now interact with the Magic Door right next to me and let's roll on to Level Two. Adventure awaits, Pip!
